description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures, one seated and draped in a flowing robe, supporting the limp body of another figure across their lap. The figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed attention to the folds of the drapery and the anatomy of the bodies. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular plinth with ornate scrollwork and a central decorative motif at the front. The surface shows signs of weathering and discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The overall color is a mottled gray and white, with patches of yellowish-brown staining. The composition and posture of the figures evoke a sense of solemnity and compassion.
description: A weathered classical sculpture of two human figures, one seated and robed, supporting another across their lap, atop an ornate plinth. The surface is mottled gray and white with signs of age and outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures clearly, with the seated figure supporting the limp body and the ornate plinth visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped robe and the profile of the seated figure, with the plinth's side details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the robed figure and the less detailed back of the sculpture, with the plinth's rear surface.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the side profile of both figures and the drapery, with the plinth's scrollwork visible.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures, one seated and robed, supporting another figure
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears suitable for outdoor urban or park environments.
